differentials.name: Pulmonary edema Cause:   infusion of large volumes of fluid combined with cardiac + renal dysfunction
differentials.raw: Pulmonary edema Cause:   infusion of large volumes of fluid combined with cardiac + renal dysfunction

context: Time:  2-3 weeks after transplantation √  nodule surrounded by halo of ground-glass attenuation (= fungal infection spreading into lung parenchyma with surrounding area of hemorrhagic infarction) √  segmental / subsegmental consolidation (= pulmonary infarction) √  cavitation of nodule with "air-crescent" sign (during recovery phase with resolving neutropenia) √  < 5-mm centrilobular nodules to 5-cm peribronchial consolidation (= airway invasion with surrounding zone of hemorrhage / organizing pneumonia) √  bilateral areas of ground-glass attenuation / consolidation √  prominent pulmonary vess
